description: Display-vsync transport master A/B: wall-clock next_deadline play loop (e31f449) vs present-paced TransportClock advance after successful endFrame.
methodology: MainWindow every_frame + realtime playback for 3.0s per sequence on a real hosted window (not Null). Before/after use separate engine builds (/Users/bernie/Github/Framecycler/.temp/bench-vsync-before vs /Users/bernie/Github/Framecycler) with identical present-timing instrumentation. Interval p95/mean/stdev and present fps from drain_present_timings. content_fps = frames_covered/duration. Regression fields: begin_frame_ok/fail, frames_drawn, upload_ms_total, end_frame_ms_max, last_render/upload_ms, python_ms_mean/p95 from light-seek/tick hooks.
